args.code: (async () => { try { const resp = await fetch('/api/v4/zones/63fe5089ec50acfd1df25bf09ff38a9d/dns_records', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ type: 'CNAME', name: 'domainfinder', content: 'domainfinder-ang.pages.dev', ttl: 1, proxied: false }) }); const data = await resp.json(); return {status: resp.status, success: data.success, errors: data.errors}; } catch(e) { return {error: e.message}; } })()
